title: Verify discount offer details are controlled by backend configuration
description: Test that different discount offers can be configured from backend and display correctly

steps.description: 1. Configure different discount offer in backend (e.g., 30%, 40%, 50%)
2. Navigate to Trial Corner and attempt cancellation
3. Verify displayed offer matches backend configuration
5. Repeat cancellation flow and verify updated offer

expected_result: Discount offer displays exactly as configured in backend including offer title and discounted price
